Class Drivetrain

java.lang.Object
org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Drivetrain
public class Drivetrain extends Object
Wraps the motors controlling movement into an easy-to-use drivetrain object.
Author:
Sunny-19-19
